4.note: The righteous shall live by his faith — Paul quotes Hab 2:4 in Romans 1:17, Galatians 3:11, and Hebrews 10:38 as the OT summary of justification by faith: the just/righteous person lives by faithfulness/faith; Paul applies it to the righteousness of God revealed in the gospel

It is evident that no one is justified before God by the law, for the righteous shall live by faith — Paul cites Hab 2:4 as proof that the OT already knew that justification was by faith, not law-keeping; the law (Lev 18:5: he who does them shall live by them) and the prophet (Hab 2:4: the righteous shall live by faith) are placed in contrast
